required_before_evaluation: A fixed public dataset identity and immutable version
An authoritative source URL and acquisition record
A versioned license text with a verified SHA-256
A reviewed product-use and redistribution decision
A deterministic item list with per-file SHA-256 and label mapping
A manifest SHA-256 recorded in the standard-admission report

product_disposition.reason: Owner formally rejected Places365 ResNet18 as a production standard pack candidate. This public-validation gate is permanently inapplicable for that candidate and must not be reopened by filling in Places2/Places365 images.

decision.reason: Places365 public validation is permanently inapplicable after the 2026-07-24 product rejection. This blocker manifest is archival evidence, not an evaluation dataset manifest.
